objectives.text: Ask Deborah Carbo what happened to her cart.
Recover Deborah's flat purse from the stolen cart.
Return the twenty ducats to Deborah.

stages.description: Deborah Carbo sits beside spilled charcoal outside the calcified graveyard. Her cart is gone and one boot will not lace.
Cultists took Deborah's cart north with a flat purse tied beneath the bed. She says the purse held twenty ducats.
The flat purse beneath Deborah's stolen cart held twenty ducats, exactly the count she gave.
Deborah pocketed the recovered twenty ducats. The promised payment stayed hidden while she claimed another five were missing.
Deborah closed the account at the number she preferred. The promised payment never appeared.
